project.name: Hippie Films × Sanpaku
project.domain: creative visual brand QR landing page and mini portfolio
project.primary_user: QR visitors, creative clients, collaborators, and Tal

project_boundary.rule: Hippie Films and Dogo are separate projects. Work for this project must stay inside the Hippie Films folder and albenda/Hippie-Films repository.
project_boundary.template_note: The Project OS package was copied from a management-template location under Dogo, but Dogo itself is not part of this project.

current_focus: Production-ready mobile-first QR landing page for Hippie Films × Sanpaku
Project OS installed and customized for future agent work
Manager system assigned to every project layer
Restyle the landing page to match the supplied black/star/gold business card
Continue visual polish now that GitHub Pages and the permanent QR are working
Latest visual pass reduces oversized starbursts, increases small circular twinkles, and adds a subtle moon reflection inside the camera lens

release_status.validation: Live URL returned 200; JS/CSS/moon assets returned 200; generated QR decoded to live URL.

critical_open_items: Confirm phone from supplied card is final: 058-69-22222
Confirm email from supplied card is final: Hippiefilmspro@gmail.com
Add final website / portfolio link if it exists
Decide English only vs Hebrew + English
Add final logo/profile image if available
hard_stops: Do not publish or deploy without explicit approval
Do not touch the separate Dogo project while working on Hippie Films
Do not use HippieFilms.in, @hippiefilms.in, Indian phone numbers, Indian emails, or unrelated business details
Do not replace or enrich contact data with guessed personal data
Do not generate a final QR before the public URL exists
source_of_truth_order: Explicit owner instructions in the active conversation
Public brand links supplied by the owner

manager_system.next_step: Finish the black/star/gold visual restyle, then run mobile/browser QA.
